chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-313 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A.4949/2022 For orders on office objections For orders on M.A. 4950/2022 For hearing of main case For orders on M.A. 4951/2022 30.05.2022 The applicant in person. == Urgency granted. The applicant by making an application u/s: 22-A 6(iii) Cr.P.C under the garb of harassment sought for direction against his officers to resolve his departmental issue and to release his salary. It was dismissed by learned Model Criminal Trial Court-I/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Hyderabad vide order dated 15.04.2022, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court. Heard arguments and perused the record. The departmental action and release of the salary involving terms of service could not be resolved by an Ex-Officio Justice of Peace in exercise of his powers u/s: 22-A 6(iii) Cr.P.C under the garb of harassment. In that situation, the application of the applicant was rightly dismissed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace by way of impugned order which is not calling for any interference by this Court; consequently the instant criminal miscellaneous application being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed applications. JUDGE
